items.title: Wireless LAN Controller
items.desc: Centralized management platform for Access Points, WLANs, RF optimization, security policies, and roaming services.
details: Centralized management of all Access Points.
Handles WLAN creation and policy enforcement.
Provides RF optimization and channel management.
Integrates with security and AAA services.

items.title: Access Points
items.desc: Provide wireless connectivity to clients and establish CAPWAP tunnels with the Wireless LAN Controller.
details: Provide Wi-Fi coverage to end users.
Connect wireless clients to the network.

items.title: Core Switch
items.desc: Provides Layer 3 connectivity between WLC, Access Points, and enterprise resources.
details: Acts as the backbone of the network.

items.title: Distribution Switch
items.desc: Aggregates access layer traffic and forwards wireless traffic toward the core network.
details: Forwards traffic to the core layer.

items.title: DHCP Server
items.desc: Assigns IP addresses and network parameters to wireless clients and Access Points.
details: Provides subnet mask and gateway information.

items.title: Authentication Server
items.desc: RADIUS/AAA server used for 802.1X authentication and secure wireless access.
